subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God and God of all who are in the heavens and on earth, my Lord and Lord of all who dwell in the kingdoms of command and truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا الهی و اله من فی السموات و الارض و ربی و رب من فی ملکوت الامر و الحق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @presence of; reunion with God
